message:
fix(outlook): migrate error mapping from retry_after_ms to service field

FcpError::UpstreamTimeout and FcpError::External now use a service
identifier string instead of retry_after_ms, matching the updated
fcp-core error API. Replace all three mapping sites in OutlookError's
ConnectorErrorMapping impl.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
